name: Hopewell, NJ
description: Home base — a small historic borough in Mercer County, New Jersey.

name: Yale University
description: One of the world's leading research universities, founded in 1701. Home to the Yale School of Drama, Beinecke Rare Book Library, and a stunning Gothic campus in New Haven, CT.

name: Harvard University
description: The oldest university in the United States, founded in 1636. Located in Cambridge, MA, Harvard has produced 8 U.S. presidents, 161 Nobel laureates, and countless groundbreaking scholars.

name: MIT — Massachusetts Institute of Technology
description: A world-renowned science and technology university in Cambridge, MA. MIT's campus sits along the Charles River and is home to 97 Nobel laureates and countless innovations.

name: Dudley Café
description: A beloved community gathering spot in Roxbury, one of Boston's most historically Black neighborhoods. Great coffee, food, and local art.

name: Sofra Bakery & Café
description: An acclaimed Middle Eastern bakery and café in Cambridge. Pastries, mezze spreads, and strong coffee — beloved by Harvard and MIT communities alike.

name: Museum of African American History
description: The largest institution in New England dedicated to preserving and sharing the contributions of African Americans. Located on Beacon Hill, it includes the African Meeting House — the oldest surviving Black church in the US.

name: Stowe Mountain Resort
description: Vermont's premier ski destination. Mt. Mansfield — Vermont's highest peak — offers terrain for all levels. Stowe village is charming and walkable.

name: Killington Resort
description: The largest ski resort in the Eastern US with 155 trails. A classic spring skiing destination — often open into May. Great for beginners and thrill-seekers alike.

name: Mont Tremblant
description: Quebec's most famous ski resort, with a picturesque pedestrian village at its base. 102 trails, beginner-friendly schools, and a distinctly French Canadian atmosphere.
address: 1000 Chemin des Voyageurs, Mont-Tremblant, QC J8E 1T1

name: Little Burgundy, Montreal
description: Montreal's historically Black neighborhood, home to the vibrant jazz heritage of Oscar Peterson and the famous Joe Beef restaurant strip. Rich with Caribbean and African diaspora culture.

name: Chez Aline
description: A beloved Haitian restaurant in Montreal serving traditional dishes like griot, diri ak pwa, and tasso. A taste of the Caribbean diaspora in Quebec.

name: Portland, ME — Old Port Waterfront
description: Portland's historic waterfront district with cobblestone streets, working piers, seafood shacks, and boutique shops. A quintessential Maine coastal experience.

name: Tesla Supercharger — Hartford, CT
description: Tesla Supercharger station near I-91 in Hartford, CT. Convenient stop between Hopewell NJ and New Haven.

name: Tesla Supercharger — Boston, MA
description: Tesla Supercharger in the Boston area.

name: Tesla Supercharger — Montpelier, VT
description: Tesla Supercharger near I-89 in Montpelier, VT. Key stop on the Vermont ski leg.
